title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on natural resources and sustainability.

questions.question: Do you think wealthy nations have a greater responsibility to address resource overconsumption than developing countries?
How optimistic are you about humanity's ability to manage natural resources sustainably, and what gives you hope or concern?

script.text: Do you think wealthy nations have a greater responsibility to address resource overconsumption than developing countries?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
